sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72513" key="oi)no/lhptos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οἰνό-ληπτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n72513.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">possessed by wine, drunken,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.4b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
